privacy.title: Privacy & Experience
privacy.pinLockDesc: Require a 4-digit code when opening the app.
privacy.darkModeDesc: Ideal for logging emotions at night.
privacy.habitRemindersDesc: Push notifications for hydration and breaks.
privacy.reminderTimeDesc: Set the time to receive habit reminders.

support.title: Technical Support
support.ticketError: Error submitting ticket. Please try again.
support.ticketInfo: We'll get back to you shortly. Please save your ticket number for reference.
support.faq1q: How do I reset my PIN?
support.faq1a: Go to Settings > Privacy and toggle the PIN lock off, then on again to set a new PIN.
support.faq2q: How do I export my data?
support.faq2a: Data export is available in the Premium plan. Upgrade from the Subscription section.
support.faq3q: How do I change my language?
support.faq3a: Use the language switcher in the top bar to toggle between English and Spanish.

dangerZone.title: Danger Zone
dangerZone.warning: Deleting your account will permanently purge all your encrypted records.
dangerZone.confirmText: Are you sure? This action cannot be undone.

journal.noEntries: No entries found with the selected filters

suggestions.subtitle: Recommended habits based on your emotional state and current routines.
suggestions.allAdopted: You've adopted all suggestions. Keep it up!
suggestions.loadError: Suggestions could not be loaded. Please try again.

reasons.breathingReason: Reduces anxiety and improves focus during stressful moments.
reasons.walkReason: Boosts mood and creativity. Great for clearing your mind.
reasons.journalingReason: Processing emotions before sleep improves sleep quality.
reasons.stretchReason: Activates your body and reduces accumulated muscle tension.
reasons.digitalReason: Disconnecting reduces cognitive overload and stress.
reasons.gratitudeReason: Practicing gratitude increases satisfaction and overall well-being.
reasons.hydrationReason: Staying hydrated improves concentration and energy.
reasons.readingReason: Stimulates the mind and helps disconnect before sleep.
reasons.yogaReason: Combines movement and meditation for holistic well-being.
reasons.reviewReason: Reflecting on your goals maintains motivation and direction.
reasons.napReason: A short nap restores energy and reduces stress.
reasons.meditationReason: Calms the mind and strengthens emotional resilience.

alerts.stressMessage: Higher than average stress levels detected. We have automatically paused your highly demanding cognitive tasks. Prioritize your well-being and rest today.

history.empty: No records from previous weeks yet.

interventions.inhaleDesc: Breathe in deeply through your nose for 4 seconds
interventions.holdDesc: Hold the air in your lungs for 7 seconds
interventions.exhaleDesc: Slowly release the air through your mouth for 8 seconds

interventions.touchDesc: Identify 4 things you can touch right now
interventions.hearDesc: Listen to 3 different sounds around you
interventions.tasteDesc: Notice 1 taste in your mouth right now

insights.u1: You showed strong resilience this week. Work-related stress dropped significantly after Wednesday.
insights.u2: Your workload was higher this week; it may help to pause a little and prioritize rest.
insights.u3: Your emotional recovery pace has been very solid; working with patients seems to energize you positively.
insights.u4: Although the week brought academic pressure, you kept a steady and consistent progression.
insights.u5: Your digital rest is improving your sleep quality and night routine consistency.
